programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Chicago Cubs v St. Louis Cardinals (Start-time 7.30pm). Coverage of the National League match from Wrigley Field, as the sides play the third and final game of the series. The two teams last met in St. Louis in another three-match contest that saw the Cardinals win the series 2-1. The visitors won the first game 6-5 before the Cubs levelled the series with a 6-1 victory. The final match saw the Cardinals win 5-1 to pick up the series win.
